narrative:
Harrison Township has 2,993 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.4 percentage points.
